mapper.update: update base_organization set group_id = #{id} where id =#{id}
mapper.select:
select
from base_organization where id =#{groupId} and deleted_flag=0
select id as groupId, cust_id as custId, business_type as businessType, state as state, init_flag as initFlag from base_organization where id =#{groupId} and deleted_flag=0
SELECT COUNT (id) from base_organization where cust_id = #{custId} and state = 1 and deleted_flag=0

SELECT id as id, state as state, group_id as groupId, parent_id as parentId, init_flag as initFlag, main_org_flag as mainOrgFlag, cust_id as custId, inner_cust_id as innerCustId, currency as currency, business_type as bizTypeId, deleted_flag as deletedFlag from base_organization where id=#{groupId}
mapper.update: update base_organization set org_name = #{bean.orgName}, org_short_name=#{bean.orgShortName}, industry_code = #{bean.industryCode}, industry_name = #{bean.industryName}, region_code= #{bean.addressDetail.regionCode}, region_name= #{bean.addressDetail.regionName}, province_code = #{bean.addressDetail.invoiceProvCode}, province_name = #{bean.addressDetail.invoiceProvName}, city_code = #{bean.addressDetail.invoiceCityCode}, city_name = #{bean.addressDetail.invoiceCityName}, district_code = #{bean.addressDetail.invoiceDistrictCode}, district_name = #{bean.addressDetail.invoiceDistrictName}, street_code = #{bean.addressDetail.invoiceStreetCode}, street_name = #{bean.addressDetail.invoiceStreetName}, address=#{bean.addressDetail.address}, phone=#{bean.phone}, email =#{bean.email}, net_address=#{bean.netAddress}, establish_time =#{bean.establishTime}, credit_code=#{bean.creditCode}, currency=#{bean.currency}, cust_id=#{bean.custId}, business_type=#{bean.bizTypeId}, remark=#{bean.remark}, main_business=#{bean.mainBusiness}, modified_by = #{bean.modifiedBy}, modified_date = #{bean.modifiedDate} where id = #{bean.id}
update base_organization set cust_id = #{bean.custId}, modified_by = #{bean.userId}, modified_date = now() where id = #{bean.orgId}
mapper.select: SELECT id as id, group_id as groupId, state as state, org_type as orgType from base_organization where org_name=#{orgName} and org_type = 2 and deleted_flag=0
mapper.sql: id, org_type, org_code, org_name, org_short_name, industry_code, industry_name, region_code, region_name, province_code, province_name, city_code, city_name, district_code, district_name, street_code, street_name, address, phone, email, net_address, credit_code, establish_time, currency, cust_id , business_type, state, init_flag, remark, main_business as mainBusiness

id, group_id, org_type, org_code, org_name, org_short_name, industry_code, industry_name, region_code, region_name, province_code, province_name, city_code, city_name, district_code, district_name, street_code, street_name, address, phone, email, net_address, establish_time, credit_code, currency, cust_id, business_type, remark, main_business, state, created_by, created_date
mapper.select: SELECT logo_url FROM base_organization WHERE id = #{groupId}
SELECT cust_id FROM base_organization WHERE id = #{groupId} and org_type=2
select business_type from base_organization where id=#{groupId} and init_flag=1 and state=1 and deleted_flag=0
select business_type FROM base_organization WHERE org_type = 2 and deleted_flag=0 and state = 1 and cust_id>0 and start_time BETWEEN #{param.startTime} and #{param.endTime}

select id as id, group_id as groupId, parent_id as parentId, org_type as orgType, org_code as orgCode, org_name as orgName FROM base_organization WHERE org_type = 2 and cust_id is null and state=1 and deleted_flag=0
mapper.sql: id, org_type, org_code, org_name, org_short_name, industry_code, industry_name, region_code, region_name, province_code, province_name, city_code, city_name, district_code, district_name, street_code, street_name, address, phone, email, net_address, credit_code, establish_time, currency, cust_id, business_type, state, init_flag, remark, main_business, created_by, created_date, logo_url, modified_by, modified_date
